title: Savory Kneaded Lightness
description: A savory dutch dish infused with garlic and sauerkraut, this light and silky texture is achieved through a brief kneading process that makes it low-fat-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional but recommended for added richness

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sauerkraut, greek yogurt, minced garlic, and olive oil.
Fold in the grated Parmesan cheese gently if using.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed. The mixture should be cohesive but not overly stiff.
Divide into two portions and knead each portion for about 20 seconds to incorporate air and enhance texture.
Gently shape each kneaded portion into balls or rolls, depending on your preference.
